error.onlyIndividualQuiz: Only individual-mode quizzes can be added to an exercise group.

groupMeta.maxPointsTooltip: Caps the total points this group contributes to the course score.

table.dragTooltip: Drag to reorder or move between groups
table.nonIndividualQuizTooltip: Synchronized and batched quizzes have a single shared run and cannot be added to a group.

addModal.createHint: Select an exercise type. You can customise all details in the next step.
addModal.importHint: Select what you want to import.

group.title: Exercise Group
group.createDescription: A set of variant exercises on the same topic. Students can work on any or all variants.
group.importDescription: Import a group of variant exercises from another course, including all its exercises.

import.groupHint: Select groups to import. All exercises in the group are included.

cardDescription.PROGRAMMING: Automated grading with test suites. Supports Java, Python, C, and more.
cardDescription.QUIZ: Multiple choice, short answer, and drag-and-drop questions.
cardDescription.MODELING: UML diagrams and model-based exercises with semi-automatic assessment.
cardDescription.TEXT: Free-text essays and open-ended questions with manual review.
cardDescription.FILE_UPLOAD: Worksheet or document submissions reviewed by instructors.

groupEdit.name: Name
groupEdit.maxPointsTooltip: Caps the total points this group contributes to the course score. Students earn at most this value from the group, regardless of which variant they complete.
groupEdit.datesOverrideWarning: Group dates override individual exercise dates.
groupEdit.datesInvalidOrder: The dates are not in a valid order.
